scenario: Security boundary - untrusted PR body in workflow
description: Workflow passes PR body to shell command
diff:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ai-review.yml b/.github/workflows/ai-review.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ai-review.yml
@@ -10,0 +11,1 @@
+        run: review-bot --prompt "${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}"
